daily.today_energy: Your vibe is grounded but restless—like you're ready to plant seeds but also want to see them bloom instantly. Channel that impatience into intentional action instead of spinning your wheels.
daily.love: Vulnerability looks good on you today. If you've been holding back on saying something real, the energy supports honest convos. Whether single or coupled, authenticity hits different rn.
daily.career: Your natural ability to get things done is amplified. This is peak energy for tackling that project you've been procrastinating on or pitching an idea you've been sitting with.
daily.health: Your body's asking for grounding—think long walks, stretching, or literally getting outside. Mental clarity follows when you move intentionally rather than rush through your day.

weekly.overview: This week's energy is all about grounding yourself and trusting your instincts. Venus is vibing with your chart, so expect moments of clarity about what actually matters. Time to release what's been weighing on you.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or flying solo, this is your moment to set some real boundaries. Your vibe is magnetic right now—people are drawn to your authenticity. If something feels off, your gut knows what's up.
weekly.career: Your creative energy is peaked right now, so channel it into projects that genuinely excite you. Don't sleep on collaborations; someone wants to link up. Trust that your hard work has been noticed, even if it feels quiet.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for more movement and touch—whether that's dancing, stretching, or just taking walks outside. Listen to what feels good instead of forcing routines. Rest when you need it; it's not laziness, it's wisdom.
